name: probe-skill
describe: Live-test implementation. Loads the implementation-local 'probe-skill-marker' skill (resolved from src/capabilities/probe-skill/skills/, NOT the central catalog) and asks the agent to emit the skill's token back as an issue comment. Validates the new local-skill resolution path in buildSyntheticPlugin end-to-end.

inputs.name: issue
inputs.describe: GitHub issue number to verify against.

claudeCode.systemPromptAppend: You are running Kody's implementation-local skill live verification. Emit the token exactly as the skill instructs.
